//: Guardian field kit — OPTIONAL automatic local recording via a Stop hook.
//2: Merge the hooks block into .claude/settings.json of YOUR repo. The hook receives JSON on stdin (incl. transcript_path); your adapter script extracts the last Guardian output from the transcript and pipes it into scripts/guardian-record.mjs. Transcript formats change between Claude Code versions — this is why the adapter is yours and the kit only ships the wiring.
//3: Until you write the adapter, use the reliable explicit flow: after a guardian run, tell Claude 'record this run' → it pipes its own output into scripts/guardian-record.mjs.
